section_name: Unlawful operation of motor assisted scooter
text:
(1) A person operating a motor assisted scooter commits the offense of unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter if:

(a) The person is under 16 years of age; or

(b) The person operates a motor assisted scooter at a rate of speed exceeding 15 miles per hour.

(2) The offense described in this section, unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter, is a Class D traffic violation. [2001 c.749 §5]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 814. Pedestrians
##### § 814.512 — Unlawful operation of motor assisted scooter

(1) A person operating a motor assisted scooter commits the offense of unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter if:

    (a) The person is under 16 years of age; or

    (b) The person operates a motor assisted scooter at a rate of speed exceeding 15 miles per hour.

(2) The offense described in this section, unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter, is a Class D traffic violation. [2001 c.749 §5]

subsections.text: A person operating a motor assisted scooter commits the offense of unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter if:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The person is under 16 years of age; or

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The person operates a motor assisted scooter at a rate of speed exceeding 15 miles per hour.
The offense described in this section, unlawful operation of a motor assisted scooter, is a Class D traffic violation. [2001 c.749 §5]
